task.title: Restructure project filesystem and dogfood boundary
task.summary: Tidy CodeWiki house by moving package code to root src, consolidating public skills, clarifying that .codewiki is dogfood state rather than package source, and removing the confusing top-level infrastructure layer.

goal.outcome: Project file structure matches the agreed root-src, single-skill, dogfood-state boundary without adding new behavior.
acceptance: Pi extension entry resolves from src/index.ts and package manifest/files no longer require extensions/codewiki.
Only skills/codewiki/SKILL.md is a public CodeWiki skill; loop/playbook instructions live under that skill as supporting markdown.
Project Pi system prompt appends a clear .codewiki dogfood-state-not-source-code boundary.
Tests and docs reference moved source paths consistently.

Top-level src/infrastructure does not exist; gateway policy, graph rebuild orchestration, knowledge parsing, and local runtime helpers live under src/application/** while harness/web translation stays under src/adapters/**.
scripts/ contains only active dev/CLI scripts; package smoke lives under tests/smoke and stale transaction duplication is removed.
Architecture/type checks pass or blockers are documented.
Task-specific acceptance coverage lives under tests/tasks/TASK-076/ with trace metadata.
non_goals: Change compiler semantics beyond file/storage path naming required by the restructure.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

summary: TASK-076 final tidy pass moved package smoke under tests, removed stale codewiki transaction script duplication, and reduced scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs to a thin CLI wrapper over application gateway logic.

source: User request to implement final scripts/deprecated-code cleanup suggestions

evidence: Package smoke remains a standalone smoke command under tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs while feature runner excludes it to avoid duplicate heavy execution.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Deleted scripts/codewiki-transaction.mjs after moving live transaction logic to src/application/gateway/transaction.ts.

Replaced scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs with a thin CLI wrapper that imports gatewayMain from src/application/gateway/index.ts and falls back to npx tsx for runtimes that cannot import TypeScript directly.
Moved scripts/smoke-test.mjs to tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs and fixed repo-root resolution.
Inlined findWikiRoot in token-benchmark.mjs so it no longer depends on the deleted transaction helper.
Removed unused execFileSync import from application gateway transaction code and cleaned stale empty manifest writes.
notes: CodeWiki health remains red because pre-existing TASK-074/TASK-075 implementation builds lack closure_brief and two old feedback builds lack produces; this final tidy pass did not touch those unrelated historical build artifacts.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Package smoke remains a standalone smoke command under tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs while feature runner excludes it to avoid duplicate heavy execution.
code_change_evidence: Deleted scripts/codewiki-transaction.mjs after moving live transaction logic to src/application/gateway/transaction.ts.

Replaced scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs with a thin CLI wrapper that imports gatewayMain from src/application/gateway/index.ts and falls back to npx tsx for runtimes that cannot import TypeScript directly.
Moved scripts/smoke-test.mjs to tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs and fixed repo-root resolution.
Inlined findWikiRoot in token-benchmark.mjs so it no longer depends on the deleted transaction helper.
Removed unused execFileSync import from application gateway transaction code and cleaned stale empty manifest writes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: scripts/ contains only active dev/CLI scripts; stale transaction duplication is removed.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: scripts/ now contains check-architecture.mjs, codewiki-gateway.mjs, and token-benchmark.mjs; codewiki-transaction.mjs deleted; grep finds no live codewiki-transaction.mjs references.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Package smoke is test code under tests/, not scripts/.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: package.json test:smoke runs tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs; tests/run.mjs excludes it from feature test duplication.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Gateway CLI remains available via scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: node scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs manifest succeeds and prints capability manifest.
npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, npm run test:smoke, npm run test:features, npm run test:pack, npm test all pass.

risks: scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs still has an npx tsx fallback for older Node runtimes that cannot import TypeScript files directly; current Node 26 runtime imports directly.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-076 Restructure project filesystem and dogfood boundary implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-076 final tidy pass moved package smoke under tests, removed stale codewiki transaction script duplication, and reduced scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs to a thin CLI wrapper over application gateway logic.

Checks: node scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs manifest, node scripts/token-benchmark.mjs --json, npm run typecheck, npm run check:architecture, npm run test:smoke, npm run test:features, npm run test:pack, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

closure_brief.user_intent: Finish TASK-076 tidy-up by confirming scripts placement and removing stale/deprecated script code.
implemented_changes: Moved package smoke from scripts/smoke-test.mjs to tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs and updated package.json.
Deleted scripts/codewiki-transaction.mjs after live transaction logic moved under src/application/gateway/transaction.ts.
Replaced scripts/codewiki-gateway.mjs with a thin wrapper over src/application/gateway/index.ts.
Removed stale transaction dependency from token-benchmark and cleaned gateway manifest/unused import.
acceptance_evidence: scripts/ contains only check-architecture.mjs, codewiki-gateway.mjs, and token-benchmark.mjs.
grep over live source/docs finds no scripts/smoke-test.mjs or codewiki-transaction.mjs references.
npm run test:smoke uses tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs and passes.
non_goals_preserved: No new CodeWiki product behavior added.
No publish, push, or release performed.
remaining_risks: CodeWiki health remains red due unrelated pre-existing build lint issues on TASK-074/TASK-075 and old feedback builds.
